changes: 🛠️ Fix compiler error in InsightsViewModel to restore successful builds
📈 Fix missing Study Analytics by properly fetching subjects from remote repository
🛡️ Prevent fatal app crashes when launching email feedback and external notice links
🎨 Standardize UI color tokens across the app by replacing PrimaryAccent with PrimaryOrange
💥 Resolve StackOverflow fatal crash in Study Analytics caused by recursive UI scaling
💾 Fix data loss bug to ensure all PDF study time and reading sessions are successfully saved to the database
title: Study Analytics Restoration & Critical Stability Fixes
